violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. > No documentation of certified servsafe manager. Gave owner resources for CFSM.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. > When measuring temperatures at the left side refrigerator (Prep line) temperatures came out to 48 degrees F. Food was also being cooled in this space. Moved foods to different fridge.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. > Behind front counter - constructed of raw wood material. Seal or paint over to provide a smooth, easily cleanable surface.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. > Charbroiler/grill top is in need of repair. Unit is collapsing on itself.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. > Many ceiling tiles are in need of repair/replacement towards the back of the kitchen area and office space.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. > Behind the cooking equipment needs cleaned more thoroughly.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
